payload.answer: Extracted three architecture-intent cards and two open-question cards. Telegram and model choice are not treated as resolved decisions.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth.

Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain data.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is an open question whether Telegram should be added later.
It is an open question which model is cheapest while saturating performance.
